{{Quote|Morley was a person, too!|Cadet Leader Kyle Katarn, after shooting Morley's killer|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Morley''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] who served in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He spoke with a characteristic drawl.

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']]. He was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] leader in the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] assigned to [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]] during the [[Battle of AX-456|assault on]] [[AX-456]]. He was ordered to blow the [[Lock/Legends|lock]] to the installation and on Kyle's command he triggered the remote. As soon as Kyle was inside the opened hatch, Morley brushed past him to do the same with the inside door, and quickly blew it off. He shoved the slab of [[Metal/Legends|metal]] only to receive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire, but was saved thanks to his [[reflective armor]]. The room was cleared of the Rebels with [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]].

As they fought their way into the second room, Morley was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by more fire. Katarn, in turn, shot and killed Morley's killer—a young boy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
